chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 2560 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 18.09.2019 For orders on office objection For hearing of main case Mr. Mumtaz Ahmed Lashari, advocate for petitioner Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl.A.G. Learned counsel for the petitioner does not press this petition as according to him the grievance of the petitioner has been redressed. Dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
